/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/botfunpay_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/dashboardwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/addlotdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/funpayclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/funpayapi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/httpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/cookieloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/gamesparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/gamesservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/botworker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/botengine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/settingsmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/botfunpay.dir/botfunpay_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o botfunpay  -Wl,-rpath,/home/undersirable/Qt/6.10.2/gcc_64/lib: /home/undersirable/Qt/6.10.2/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /home/undersirable/Qt/6.10.2/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /home/undersirable/Qt/6.10.2/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/undersirable/Qt/6.10.2/gcc_64/lib
